name: Instagram Content Schedule Generator
description: Reads content strategy inputs and blog post data from Google Sheets, researches trending topics via Exa, uses Claude AI to generate a complete Instagram content schedule with captions and hashtags, and saves the schedule back to Sheets with a summary to Slack. Adapted from n8n's Instagram content schedule with GPT-4 and Apify.

source.originalName: Auto-generate Instagram content schedule with GPT-4, Apify, and Google Sheets

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for trend research

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID (used for reading inputs and saving schedule)

brandName.description: Brand or business name for personalized content

contentPillars.description: Comma-separated content pillars for the brand

postsPerWeek.description: Number of Instagram posts to schedule per week

steps.name: Build Exa query for Instagram trend research
Build Claude prompt for Instagram content schedule
Run Claude AI Instagram schedule generation
Build Sheets rows from content schedule
Save content schedule to Google Sheets
